subsection.heading: S corporation treated as partnership, etc.
subsection.chapeau: For purposes of subparts A and F of part III, and part V, of subchapter N (relating to income from sources without the United States)—

paragraph.content: an S corporation shall be treated as a partnership, and
the shareholders of such corporation shall be treated as partners of such partnership.

content.p: For purposes of section 904(f) (relating to recapture of overall foreign loss), the making or termination of an election to be treated as an S corporation shall be treated as a disposition of the business.

note.heading: Prior Provisions
note.p: A prior section 1373, added Pub. L. 85–866, title I, § 64(a), Sept. 2, 1958, 72 Stat. 1652; amended Pub. L. 89–389, § 2(b)(3), Apr. 14, 1966, 80 Stat. 114; Pub. L. 91–172, title III, § 301(b)(10), Dec. 30, 1969, 83 Stat. 586, related to taxation of corporation undistributed taxable income to shareholders, prior to the general revision of this subchapter by section 2 of Pub. L. 97–354.

note.heading: Effective Date
note.p: Section applicable to taxable years beginning after Dec. 31, 1982, see section 6(a) of Pub. L. 97–354, set out as a note under section 1361 of this title.
